title: OAuthPreset
description: Definition of a remote MCP server app preset. One JSON file per provider; filename should match the `id` field with .json extension.

id.description: Lowercase, hyphenated, unique across all presets. Matches filename (without .json).

name.description: Display name shown on the card (e.g. 'Linear', 'monday.com').

icon.description: Single emoji fallback used when logo is not available.

logo.description: Path to the brand logo under /icons/brands/ (preferred over the emoji). Use .svg when possible; .png is acceptable for color logos.

logoColor.description: When true, the logo ships with its own color palette (render as-is). When false/absent, the logo is a monochrome SVG that the UI will tint.

description.description: One sentence describing what this app lets the agent do.

localStdio.description: Path 0 — local stdio MCP. No OAuth / no remote URL. Requires `stdioCommand` + `stdioArgs`.

stdioCommand.description: Command used to spawn the local MCP (e.g. 'npx').

dcrSupported.description: Path 1 — Dynamic Client Registration (RFC 7591). Zero-config; brain-trust4 handles the whole flow.

apiKeyOnly.description: Path 2 — API key / Personal Access Token. User pastes a key.

apiKeyEnv.description: Environment variable name that may hold the API key (takes precedence over stored value).

apiKeyHeader.description: HTTP header the key is sent in.

apiKeyFormat.description: Format string for the header value; {key} is substituted.

authUrl.description: Path 3 — manual OAuth fallback. The provider's authorization URL.

tokenUrl.description: Path 3 — manual OAuth fallback. The provider's token exchange URL.

clientIdEnv.description: Environment variable name that holds the OAuth client ID (manual OAuth path).

clientSecretEnv.description: Environment variable name that holds the OAuth client secret (manual OAuth path).

setupDocsUrl.description: Link to the provider's setup docs shown on the card.

mcpUrl.description: MCP server URL for remote transports; for local stdio presets, a descriptive string like 'stdio: npx …'.

blocked.description: When true, the card is rendered in a 'Coming Soon' section with Connect disabled.

blockedReason.description: Short explanation shown on a blocked card.

setupSteps.description: Optional rich setup walk-through, rendered as a numbered list on the card.

gotcha.description: Optional warning callout rendered in yellow.

allOf.description: dcrSupported, apiKeyOnly, and localStdio are mutually exclusive.
